---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or change to the scorecard
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What you want

Describe the change and the business reason for it (e.g. "add Firm City to Competitive Landscape
so we can identify top performing brokerages by office").

## Why it matters

What decision or workflow does this unblock for you or the director?

## Notes / constraints (optional)

Anything about the data (CoStar field names, edge cases) or desired UX that would help scope the
change.
